title: gentianella lineata
intro: Gentianella lineata, also known as Lineate Gentian, is a species of flowering plant in the gentian family (Gentianaceae). It is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe, characterized by its yellow or greenish-yellow flowers and narrow, lance-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections. Gentianella lineata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and has been traditionally used to aid digestion, reduce fever, and promote overall well-being.
